AR1.justification: Strongest descriptive framing of the five — 'this file is the durable record', menu of moves offered without committing, diagnostic question rather than prescription — content would land cleanly in observations.md, but no canonical filename and no in-band naming of the observation-vs-decision routing rationale.

AR3.justification: No cross-references in the artifact; no daybook Log breadcrumb pointing at the observation.

AR4.justification: Single standalone file with no ISO-dated section structure — re-running on the same prompt would overwrite rather than append a new dated entry as observations.md is meant to be.
